description:
Try Higgsfield's new MCP Tool for FREE Today - https://higgsfield.ai/s/mcp-austin.marchese-naMdfi

In this video, I found out how Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY uses AI to run his businesses.

It turns out he runs a simple 4-pillar system that anyone can follow. It doesn't matter if you use Claude Code, Codex, Claude Cowork, whatever, these pillars are critical for you to understand. 

In this breakdown, I also walk through a mistake his teams were making that was so bad that his wife, Leila, who is the CEO of Acquisition.com, had to send a company-wide memo telling them to stop. 

I'll walk you through each pillar, the exact mistake to avoid, and how to apply this to whatever you're building.

Timestamps:
(0:00) - How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
(0:34) - Pillar 1: Your Data Is Your Moat
(5:23) - Pillar 2: Voice First, AI Second
(7:24) - Pillar 3: Break Up Your Workflows
(11:28) - Pillar 4: The Compound Effect

--------
FOR INDIVIDUALS:
- Try Higgsfields new MCP Tool for FREE Today - https://higgsfield.ai/s/mcp-austin.marchese-naMdfi
- Use BuildPartner to build 10x faster with Claude Code (try free): https://buildpartner.ai/hai
- Free 5-day AI playbook (what I used to build a $25M+ startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/hai

FOR BUSINESSES, Ways to work with me:
- Want AI systems built into your operations? https://theincubator.xyz/ops/hai
- Want to build a SaaS product without hiring a CTO? https://www.theincubator.xyz/eng/hai
--------

If you're new here, I'm Austin Marchese. How I got here...
16: First business (SAT Math Tutor)
22: Graduated Stevens Tech, 4.0, College Basketball, software engineering job at JPM
23: Bitcoin ATM company + building algorithms for a professional gambler (fun story)
24: Started creating content, grew 100k+ followers, built first agency, The Incubator
25: Scaled agency to 15+ team members, $75K/M while working full time
26: Quit my job, joined a startup called IYK
27: Became COO of a $25M+ tech startup, worked with Ed Sheeran, Chance the Rapper and more
28: Built a $20M+ real estate portfolio in the background
29: Transitioned from IYK, re-launched The Incubator, grew it to a 6-figure biz in 30 days. Now building BuildPartner.ai

To everyone who's spending time learning and putting the work in, cheers. Anyone can make comments from the sidelines, but not everyone can build...

- Austin

Follow/Subscribe

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/austin.marchese/
- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@austin.marchese
